global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with prominent text elements highlighting the service.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple signup for CoinBridge.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the entire canvas, providing a lively and fresh atmosphere.

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'CoinBridge' in bold, black font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Service description
elements.description: The text reads 'Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card' in a clear, dark font, centrally positioned.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: The phrase 'Try for free' is displayed in a bold, dark font at the bottom of the ad, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: There are abstract geometric shapes in lighter shades of green, adding visual interest without distracting from the text.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small circular icon in a light green shade is positioned at the top left corner.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a light green color is located in the center, possibly serving as a decorative element.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The word 'CoinBridge' is prominently displayed in a large, bold font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Service details
elements.description: The text 'Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card' is written in a dark font, providing key information about the service.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Fast signup, instant card

elements.label: Free trial offer
elements.description: The text 'Try for free' is in a bold font at the bottom, encouraging users to take action.
